positive: A stylized geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, rendered in deep indigo, vibrant magenta, and warm gold gradients. The foreground features a clean, minimalist river flowing through crystalline peaks. Use strong vector art elements and flat color blocks contrasting with gradient skies. The overall composition must be symmetrical, centered, and highly scalable for apparel printing. Include subtle abstract flora and stylized constellations filling the upper space. Minimalist aesthetic, high contrast, vector illustration, graphic novel style, detailed linework, clean silhouette, 8k print quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, low quality, grainy, out of frame, noise, gradient fading, smudge, dirty, low detail, complex textures, photorealism
